title: Samurai Conqueror
description:
Rewrite history across Japan’s past.

Samurai Conqueror is a historical timeline strategy game where you lead legendary figures from the Kofun to the Meiji era, uniting the islands through diplomacy, war, and innovation.

Choose a legendary leader to command your faction, expand your influence across eras, and bring the entirety of Japanese history under your rule.

Relive and rewrite history through decisive events such as the Taika Reform, the Genpei War, the Ōnin War, the Battle of Sekigahara, and the Meiji Restoration.

Key Features

• Chrono Strategy: Lead factions across the entire timeline of Japan — from the Kofun to the Meiji era — and experience how politics, warfare, and technology evolve through the ages.

• Legendary Leaders: Assign historical heroes to govern regions, command armies, and shape the destiny of their eras.

• Alternate History: Rewrite Japan’s past by changing the outcomes of decisive events such as the Taika Reform, Battle of Sekigahara, and Meiji Restoration.

• Cultural Power: Strengthen your nation through culture, diplomacy, and innovation to unlock new achievements and reforms.
description_short: Unify Japanese History! A Timeline Strategy Game Where History Itself Becomes the Battlefield.
